title: campanula patula var. neglecta
intro: Campanula patula var. neglecta, also known as the bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Campanula patula var. neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine as a topical application for wound care.
